UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2019 FOR DEFAULT (PROVE-UP) HEARING - GRANTED. PROPOSED JUDGMENT WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY ADRIANA P. ROBLES, CSR #1412. TELEPHONE: 415-551-0332. EMAIL: AROBLES@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE RITZ-CARLTON HOTEL COMPANY, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA THE RITZ-CARLTON, SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCAPE DESTINATIONS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $27,131.32 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $5,445.59 INTEREST, $521.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $35,923.66, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2019 Continued To Jan-15-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Escape Destinations, Inc., a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana P. Robles, CSR #1412. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

John C. Josefsberg, Esq. appeared for plaintiff the Ritz-Carlton Hotel Company, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, d/b/a the Ritz-Carlton, San Francisco.
No appearance by defendant Escape Destinations, Inc., a California corporation.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Express Contract, Open Account, Quantum Meruit and Unjust Enrichment was filed on January 17, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant Escape Destinations, Inc.'s Registered Agent of Process occurred on January 29, 2019 and was effectuated on February 16, 2019.
Default as to defendant Escape Destinations, Inc. was entered on April 4, 2019.
No DOE defendants named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff the Ritz-Carlton Hotel Company, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, d/b/a the Ritz-Carlton, San Francisco, and against the defaulted defendant Escape Destinations, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,131.32.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,445.59.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $521.75.
Total - $35,923.66.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Continued To Dec-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2019 Continued To Dec-04-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Continued To Oct-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
